keyPoints: Premier Boxing Champion signs deal with DAZN
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de deportes.
fullArticle:
Premier Boxing Champions has found a new home as Errol Spence kicks off their first card on their new platform.

DAZN has effectively consolidated the sport of boxing, as it has been announced that Premier Boxing Champions, alongside TGB Promotions, has formally inked a deal with streaming platform DAZN to bring their marquee fights to the platform, starting with Errol Spence vs Tim Tszyu on July 25, and following that up with including a recently announced fight between Rolly Romero vs Teofimo Lopez on August 22 that will be on both DAZN and Prime Video.

The exact specifics of the deal weren’t made public at this time, but it was stated that their top talent in David Benavidez, Errol Spence Jr., Sebastian Fundora, Isaac ‘Pitbull’ Cruz, Jermall and Jermall Charlo, Tim Tszyu, Lamont Roach ...
